evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/auth.spec.ts and its POM file pages/login-page.ts. Find any anti-patterns, weak assertions, or quality issues.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: test.only (P0), waitForTimeout (P1), dangling locator (P0), one-shot boolean (P0), conditional bypass (P0), force:true (P1), .catch(()=>{}) in POM (P0), raw DOM query in POM (P1), name-assertion mismatch (P0), missing then (P0), YAGNI unused POM members (P2), hardcoded credentials (P1), deprecated page.click API (P1)
assertions: Detects raw DOM query in POM (#6)

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/dashboard.spec.ts. Identify all anti-patterns and suggest improvements.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: serial() (P1), >=0 always-passing (P0), waitForTimeout (P1), missing assertion (P0), toBeAttached (P0), boolean discarded (P0), positional selectors (P1), raw DOM query (P1), missing then (P0), name-assertion mismatch (P0), missing auth setup (P0), deprecated page action API (P1)
assertions: Flags missing assertion on export test (#2/#8)
Flags missing then on sidebar toggle (#2)
Flags name-assertion mismatch on user name (#1)
Detects missing auth setup - no login before /dashboard (#12)

evals.prompt: Review all Playwright test files in evals/files/ including POM files. Give me a full quality audit with severity ratings.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive report covering all spec files and POM files. Finds issues across all checks. Summary table with P0/P1/P2 counts. Coverage gap suggestions referencing specific findings. Cross-file YAGNI analysis. Systemic issues section. Top priorities.
assertions: Detects try/catch error swallowing in settings (#3)
Detects inconsistent POM usage in settings (#13)
Detects missing auth setup in dashboard (#12)
Coverage gap suggestions reference specific findings (Phase 3)

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/checkout.spec.ts and its POM file pages/checkout-page.ts. Find any anti-patterns or quality issues.
evals.expected_output: Clean, well-written tests. Minimal or no P0/P1 findings. Should recognize good practices: beforeEach, getByTestId/getByRole, storageState auth, env vars for credentials, test.skip with reason. Should NOT flag: test.skip with reason comment, JUSTIFIED nth() usage in POM. May suggest minor improvements but should not produce false positives.
assertions: Does NOT flag test.skip as an issue (has valid reason)
Does NOT flag nth() in checkout-page.ts (has JUSTIFIED comment)
Reports zero or near-zero P0 issues
Recognizes good practices (getByTestId, getByRole, env vars, beforeEach)
Does NOT produce false positives on well-written assertions

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/search-justified.spec.ts. Check for anti-patterns and respect JUSTIFIED suppression markers.
evals.expected_output: Should skip patterns with JUSTIFIED comments above them (first() in search results, force:true on filter). Should flag: unjustified nth() on pagination, waitForTimeout without justification. Should detect deprecated page.locator usage patterns.
assertions: Skips JUSTIFIED first() in search results test
Skips JUSTIFIED force:true in filter test
Flags unjustified nth(2) on pagination button (#10a)
Does NOT flag locator-based page.locator('#x').fill() as deprecated (it is correct API)

evals.prompt: Review the Cypress E2E tests in evals/files/products.cy.ts. Identify all anti-patterns and suggest improvements.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Cypress framework via Phase 0. Should detect: it.only (P0), cy.wait numeric sleeps (P1), dangling cy.get (P0), conditional assertion bypass (P0), force:true without justification (P1), name-assertion mismatch on add-to-cart (P0), missing then on product details (P0). Should skip Playwright-specific checks.
assertions: Flags dangling cy.get without assertion chain
Flags conditional assertion bypass with Cypress.env (#5a)
Flags force:true without JUSTIFIED on discount apply (#5b)
Flags missing assertion on product details (#2)

evals.prompt: Review the Playwright E2E tests in evals/files/profile-mixed.spec.ts. Find anti-patterns but don't over-flag legitimate try/catch and test.skip usage.
evals.expected_output: Should detect: missing await on expect (#15 P0), missing await on action (#16 P0), deprecated page.fill/page.click (#17 P1), networkidle usage (#9c P1). Should NOT flag: legitimate try/catch in beforeEach (setup retry), test.skip with reason, legitimate try/catch in cleanup (delete address test).
assertions: Detects missing await on expect in update-display-name test (#15)
Detects missing await on action in upload-photo test (#16)
Detects deprecated page.fill and page.click in update-bio test (#17)
Detects networkidle usage in activity-feed test (#9c)
Does NOT flag legitimate try/catch in beforeEach (setup retry)
Does NOT flag test.skip with reason comment
Does NOT flag legitimate try/catch in cleanup (delete-address test)
